column9: Alan was born on the___________of April. (THREE)

column16: I can't give the umbrella to________ . (HE)

column19: Your bones get____________as you grow up. (BIG)
column20: The Pacific is the___________ocean in the world. (BIG)
column21: The hippopotamus is one of the____________animals. (HEAVY)
column22: The box is__________but the suitcase is much_________ . (HEAVY/HEAVY)
